title: Watch the Switchyard Route
summary: Rook wants an extra set of eyes while a live courier handoff crosses Bureau territory.

title: Recover Missing Clinic Stock
summary: The clinic lost a crate of synthblood and wants it back before the district starts smelling weakness.

title: Scrub a Dead Record
summary: A family wants an old board record erased before the Bureau rediscovers it.

title: Lean on a Club Debtor
summary: Mara needs a debtor reminded that the shard has a memory and legs.

title: Lift a Dock Manifest
summary: A dockside shipping ledger is changing hands tonight. Pox wants it borrowed before the Bureau can price the names inside.

title: Blind the Relay Sweep
summary: Static wants a Bureau scan window muddied long enough for an old ghost-route to pass unseen.

title: Turn a Bureau Tail
summary: A Bureau watcher has been leaning too close to the club. Mara wants them misled, embarrassed, or carried away from her clients.

target.name: Helix Dane
target.look: Helix Dane wears a Bureau rain shell over office shoes and carries the sort of stillness that gets people catalogued.
target.motive: Build a case around the club by leaning on debtors, couriers, and anyone desperate enough to talk.
target.threat: Procedural cruelty, backup not far behind, and the confidence of somebody who thinks the city files on their side.

title: Escort a Cold Chain
summary: A sealed crate needs to move through the flood docks before dawn and nobody sane wants to ask what hums inside it.

title: Open the Wrong Hatch
summary: Sable wants eyes inside a maintenance hatch the Bureau has started visiting too often for coincidence.

target.name: Ravel Cinder
target.look: Ravel Cinder is a contract cutter in a maintenance slicker, all bolt-croppers, insulated gloves, and a smile that sounds rented.
target.motive: Keep the hatch routes open for whoever is moving clinic freight and ghosted names through the underpass.
target.threat: Tunnel familiarity, dirty tools, and zero hesitation about collapsing a route with you inside it.

title: Watch the Name Wall
summary: A dead handle is flashing live somewhere. Widow Byte wants proof before the shrine turns it into theology.

title: Lift a Vault Index
summary: A buried index in the vault names buyers, debtors, and corpses in the same hand. The Clerk wants to know who sent you before anyone leaves with it.

target.name: Nine-Knives Orin
target.look: Nine-Knives Orin moves like a panic attack in a long coat, edges glinting from every seam where metal could hide.
target.motive: Reach the buried index first, strip the buyer names out of it, and sell the remains back as truth.
target.threat: Fast hands, faster exits, and the sort of reputation that arrives one room before the body.
